Hermes Agent: The New AI Assistant That Grows With You

Discover Hermes Agent, a revolutionary open-source AI assistant from Nous Research that learns from your projects and builds skills over time. We walk through the setup, test its coding abilities, and compare it against OpenClaw to find the best autonomous agent.

00:00 - Intro: Meet Hermes Agent
01:03 - Growth and Productivity Stats
01:34 - Installation and Setup Guide
02:54 - Configuring API Keys and Tools
04:09 - Live Demo: Coding with Hermes
05:39 - Deep Dive: Features and Memory
07:27 - Hermes vs. OpenClaw Comparison
09:56 - Final Verdict and Community
